A '''laser cauterizer''' was a portable device used to disinfect and burn wounds shut by emitting a low-frequency [[Laser/Legends|laser]] beam. [[Medkit]]s typically came equipped with these.

==Description==
Laser cauterizers were used for emergency field surgery.<ref name="EGWT" /> When activated, a laser cauterizer fired a low-frequency [[Laser/Legends|laser]] that could be used to cauterize wounds and disinfect them.<ref name="GFT">''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''</ref> Laser cauterizers were capable of resealing major [[Blood/Legends|blood]] vessels.<ref name="Fatal Alliance">''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]''</ref>

Laser cauterizers were included in [[Medpac/Legends|medpacs]], including [[BioTech Industries/Legends|Biotech Industries']] [[FastFlesh medpac/Legends|FastFlesh medpac]] and [[Chiewab Amalgamated Pharmaceuticals Company|Chiewab's]] [[GLiS Emergency Medpac]].<ref name="EGWT" /> The [[field cauterizer]] was a specific type of laser cauterizer manufactured by [[Nilar Med/Tech Corporation]].<ref name="GFT" />

==History==
[[Ula Vii]] used a laser cauterizer, along with a [[Bone stabilizer/Legends|bone stabilizer]] compound, to treat [[Larin Moxla]] when the later had four fingers severed by a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="Fatal Alliance" />
